questionHtml: Hence, find the coordinates of the rational point Q where this tangent intersects C, expressing each coordinate as a fraction.
markschemeHtml:
attempt to solve simultaneously with y2=x3+2           (M1)


Note: The M1 mark can be awarded for an unsupported correct answer in an incorrect format (e.g. (4.25, -8.875)).


obtain 174, -718           A1
